title: Reported speech (present)
objectives: Report what someone is saying now
Use 'dice que' and 'pregunta si' without tense shifts
grammar_notes: When the reporting verb is in the present, no tense shift in the reported part: 'Ana dice: "Tengo hambre."' → 'Ana dice que tiene hambre.'
Pronouns change: '"Yo soy ruso"' → 'él dice que es ruso.'
Yes/no questions become indirect with 'si': '"¿Vienes?"' → 'Me pregunta si vengo.'
example_phrases: Mi madre dice que llega a las siete.
